## Description
What does this PR do? Briefly describe the change.

## Related Issue
Closes #(issue number) or Links to #(issue number)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Enhancement
- [ ] Documentation update

## Testing
How was this tested? What should reviewers test?

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, CONTRIBUTING, etc.)
- [ ] Tested in multiple browsers
- [ ] DiscGolfAPI attribution remains visible
- [ ] No console errors or warnings
- [ ] Accessibility verified (keyboard navigation, screen readers)

## Screenshots (if UI changes)
Add before/after screenshots or animated GIFs if applicable.

## Notes for Reviewers
Any special instructions or things to pay attention to?
